sn45.49:1.0.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, this is the forerunner and precursor of the rising of the sun, that is, the dawn. So too, bhikkhus,sn.v.30for a bhikkhu this is the forerunner and precursor for the arising of the Noble Eightfold Path, that is, good friendship.When a bhikkhu has a good friend, it is to be expected that he will develop and cultivate this Noble Eightfold Path.
